top_signals.title: 3 tenant credits downgraded this week
top_signals.detail: S&P moved Aldridge Logistics, Cascadia Health Systems, and Meriwether Apparel from BBB- to BB+. Combined exposure: 4.1% of total rent roll. Watchlist refreshed.

top_signals.title: SF Bay leasing pipeline 22% below plan
top_signals.detail: Tour-to-LOI conversion in San Francisco has slid from 18% to 11% over six weeks. Pipeline coverage on 2H expiries now 1.4x vs target of 2.0x.

top_signals.title: 1 Federal Square MEP retrofit running 14% over budget
top_signals.detail: Procore cost feed shows mechanical scope expansion plus chilled-water tie-in cost overruns. Forecast complete-cost up $4.2M, projected stabilized yield-on-cost drops to 6.8%.
